title: Deterministic BlueRev/IP sensitivity floor

implementation.exact_insertion_point: scripts/router_policy_message_route_smoke.py:631, immediately after the assume_public_simple/else normalization block sets assume_public_simple_safe_path and immediately before return input_obj
implementation.monotonic_floor: public/internal/unknown -> sensitive; sensitive remains sensitive; secret remains secret

compatibility.phase_b_bridge_change: scripts/router_policy_hint_bridge_probe.py keeps secret/unknown as bucket-only hard gates but no longer treats bucket-only sensitive+low_risk as a hard gate; existing raw-private/manual-review/secret hard gates still dominate.

tests.public_internal_to_sensitive: tests/test_router_policy_message_route_smoke.py::test_a5_r3_002_bluerev_ip_floor_overrides_public_and_internal_external_candidates sets public/internal, applies floor, asserts sensitive, _qualifies_for_external_candidate false, external_allowed false.
tests.assume_public_simple_public_to_sensitive: tests/test_router_policy_message_route_smoke.py::test_a5_r3_001_bluerev_ip_floor_runs_after_assume_public_simple asserts assume_public_simple_safe_path true, hard_reason_codes ['low_risk'], final bucket sensitive, local answer-only route.
tests.secret_preservation: tests/test_router_policy_message_route_smoke.py::test_a5_r3_003_bluerev_ip_floor_does_not_downgrade_secret asserts mixed credential+BlueRev remains secret and blocked by existing credential/write behavior.
tests.false_positive_coverage: tests/test_router_policy_message_route_smoke.py::test_a5_r3_004_bluerev_and_naked_nouns_do_not_trigger_ip_floor covers bare BlueRev, pompa, parametri, brevetto, and Python code false positives.
tests.backend_mocked_responder: backend/tests/test_dev_local_chat.py::test_a5r3_bluerev_ip_sensitive_answer_only_executes_with_mocked_responder asserts executed true, reason local_answer, answer_local, LOCAL_FAST, answer_only, responder called.

test_harness.backend_import_path_fixture: backend/tests/conftest.py adds backend and scripts to sys.path for backend pytest invocations from repo root.

residual_risks: The active Python initially lacked pytest; backend/requirements-dev.txt was installed before backend verification.
A5-R3 detector is phrase-based by design; near-miss wording without an explicit marker is intentionally not floored.
